---
title: "bid (BaseAuction)"
---
stateDiagram-v2
    direction TB
    [*] --> q_reentrancy: check s_entered
    q_reentrancy --> q_revert_reentrant: s_entered == true
    q_revert_reentrant --> [*]: revert ReentrantCall
    q_reentrancy --> q_lock: s_entered == false
    q_lock --> q_load_params: s_entered = true
    q_load_params --> q_check_auction: load assetParams, auctionStart, elapsedTime
    q_check_auction --> q_revert_invalid: auctionStart == 0 or elapsedTime > auctionDuration
    q_revert_invalid --> [*]: revert InvalidAuction
    q_check_auction --> q_get_price: auction is live
    q_get_price --> q_check_min_bid: _getAssetPrice(asset, true), compute bidUsdValue
    q_check_min_bid --> q_revert_low: bidUsdValue < minBidUsdValue
    q_revert_low --> [*]: revert BidValueTooLow
    q_check_min_bid --> q_check_balance: bidUsdValue >= minBidUsdValue
    q_check_balance --> q_revert_high: amount > availableBalance
    q_revert_high --> [*]: revert BidAmountTooHigh
    q_check_balance --> q_compute_out: amount <= availableBalance
    q_compute_out --> q_transfer_asset: assetOutAmount = _getAssetOutAmount(...)
    q_transfer_asset --> q_check_callback: safeTransfer(asset, msg.sender, amount)
    q_check_callback --> q_callback: data.length != 0
    q_callback --> q_pull_out: auctionCallback(msg.sender, assetOut, assetOutAmount, data)
    q_check_callback --> q_pull_out: data.length == 0
    q_pull_out --> q_emit: safeTransferFrom(msg.sender, this, assetOutAmount)
    q_emit --> q_unlock: emit AuctionBidSettled
    q_unlock --> [*]: s_entered = false

    note right of q_transfer_asset
        INV-001: Reentrancy guard via s_entered flag (not ReentrancyGuard)
        INV-002: Asset transferred to bidder BEFORE pulling assetOut (flash-loan pattern)
        INV-003: Callback invoked between asset transfer out and assetOut pull-in
        INV-004: bidUsdValue must meet minBidUsdValue threshold
        INV-005: bid amount cannot exceed contract's asset balance
    end note

---
title: "performUpkeep (BaseAuction)"
---
stateDiagram-v2
    direction TB
    [*] --> q_decode: abi.decode(performData)
    q_decode --> q_check_eligible: get eligibleAssets, endedAuctions
    q_check_eligible --> q_get_out_price: eligibleAssets.length > 0
    q_get_out_price --> q_check_fee_agg: _getAssetPrice(assetOut, true)
    q_check_eligible --> q_check_fee_agg: eligibleAssets.length == 0
    q_check_fee_agg --> q_transfer_funds: hasFeeAggregator and eligibleAssets.length > 0
    q_transfer_funds --> q_iter_eligible: feeAggregator.transferForSwap(this, eligibleAssets)
    q_check_fee_agg --> q_iter_eligible: no transfer needed
    q_iter_eligible --> q_validate_asset: for i in eligibleAssets
    q_validate_asset --> q_revert_live: auctionStarts[asset] != 0
    q_revert_live --> [*]: revert LiveAuction
    q_validate_asset --> q_check_decimals: auctionStarts[asset] == 0
    q_check_decimals --> q_revert_params: decimals == 0
    q_revert_params --> [*]: revert AssetParamsNotSet
    q_check_decimals --> q_get_asset_price: decimals > 0
    q_get_asset_price --> q_check_min_size: get assetPrice
    q_check_min_size --> q_revert_below_min: usdValue < minAuctionSizeUsd
    q_revert_below_min --> [*]: revert AmountBelowMinAuctionSize
    q_check_min_size --> q_is_asset_out: usdValue >= minAuctionSizeUsd
    q_is_asset_out --> q_transfer_out: asset == assetOut
    q_transfer_out --> q_iter_eligible: safeTransfer to assetOutReceiver
    q_is_asset_out --> q_start_auction: asset != assetOut
    q_start_auction --> q_iter_eligible: auctionStarts[asset] = block.timestamp, emit AuctionStarted
    q_iter_eligible --> q_iter_ended: eligible loop complete
    q_iter_ended --> q_end_auction: for i in endedAuctions
    q_end_auction --> q_revert_invalid: auctionStarts[asset] == 0
    q_revert_invalid --> [*]: revert InvalidAuction
    q_end_auction --> q_do_end: auctionStarts[asset] != 0
    q_do_end --> q_iter_ended: _onAuctionEnd, delete auctionStarts, emit AuctionEnded
    q_iter_ended --> [*]: all loops complete

    note right of q_start_auction
        INV-001: Only AUCTION_WORKER_ROLE can call performUpkeep
        INV-002: No auction can be started if one already exists for that asset
        INV-003: Asset out tokens are forwarded directly to receiver, not auctioned
        INV-004: Ended auctions must have been previously started (auctionStarts != 0)
    end note

---
title: "_getAssetPrice (PriceManager)"
---
stateDiagram-v2
    direction TB
    [*] --> q_load: load priceInfo and feedInfo for asset
    q_load --> q_init_price: price = priceInfo.usdPrice; updatedAt = priceInfo.timestamp
    q_init_price --> q_check_stale: minTimestamp = block.timestamp - stalenessThreshold

    q_check_stale --> q_check_fallback: updatedAt < minTimestamp (streams price stale)
    q_check_stale --> q_compute_valid: updatedAt >= minTimestamp (streams price fresh)

    q_check_fallback --> q_compute_valid: usdDataFeed == address(0) (no fallback configured)
    q_check_fallback --> q_fetch_feed: usdDataFeed != address(0)

    q_fetch_feed --> q_compare_ts: (answer, dataFeedUpdatedAt) = usdDataFeed.latestRoundData()
    q_compare_ts --> q_compute_valid: updatedAt >= dataFeedUpdatedAt (streams more recent)
    q_compare_ts --> q_scale_feed: updatedAt < dataFeedUpdatedAt (feed more recent)

    q_scale_feed --> q_compute_valid: price = answer scaled to 18 decimals; updatedAt = dataFeedUpdatedAt

    q_compute_valid --> q_check_validation: isValid = (price != 0) AND (updatedAt >= minTimestamp)

    q_check_validation --> q_validate_zero: withValidation == true
    q_check_validation --> [*]: withValidation == false; return (price, updatedAt, isValid)

    q_validate_zero --> q_revert_zero: price == 0
    q_revert_zero --> [*]: revert Errors.ZeroFeedData()
    q_validate_zero --> q_validate_stale: price != 0
    q_validate_stale --> q_revert_stale: updatedAt < minTimestamp
    q_revert_stale --> [*]: revert Errors.StaleFeedData()
    q_validate_stale --> [*]: return (price, updatedAt, isValid)

    note right of q_check_stale
        INV-001: Data Streams price is prioritized over Data Feed price
        INV-002: fallback to Data Feed only when streams price is stale AND feed is configured
        INV-003: most recent timestamp wins between streams and feed
    end note

    note right of q_scale_feed
        INV-004: returned price is always scaled to exactly 18 decimals
        INV-005: with validation enabled, zero price and stale price both revert
    end note

---
title: "_applyFeedInfoUpdates (PriceManager)"
---
stateDiagram-v2
    direction TB
    [*] --> q_check_empty: adds.length == 0 AND removes.length == 0?
    q_check_empty --> q_revert_empty: true
    q_revert_empty --> [*]: revert Errors.EmptyList()
    q_check_empty --> q_remove_loop: false

    q_remove_loop --> q_remove_hook: i < removes.length
    q_remove_hook --> q_remove_asset: _onFeedInfoUpdate(asset, true)
    q_remove_asset --> q_revert_not_listed: s_allowlistedAssets.remove(asset) == false
    q_revert_not_listed --> [*]: revert Errors.AssetNotAllowlisted(asset)
    q_remove_asset --> q_cleanup: remove succeeded
    q_cleanup --> q_remove_loop: delete feedIdToAsset, feedInfo, dataStreamsPrice; emit AssetRemovedFromAllowlist; i++
    q_remove_loop --> q_add_loop: i >= removes.length

    q_add_loop --> q_add_hook: i < adds.length
    q_add_hook --> q_validate_asset: _onFeedInfoUpdate(asset, false)
    q_validate_asset --> q_revert_zero_addr: asset == address(0)
    q_revert_zero_addr --> [*]: revert Errors.InvalidZeroAddress()
    q_validate_asset --> q_validate_feed: asset != address(0)
    q_validate_feed --> q_revert_zero_val: stalenessThreshold == 0 OR (feedId == 0 AND dataFeed == 0)
    q_revert_zero_val --> [*]: revert Errors.InvalidZeroValue()
    q_validate_feed --> q_check_streams: valid feed params

    q_check_streams --> q_streams_validate: dataStreamsFeedId != bytes32(0)
    q_check_streams --> q_update_allowlist: dataStreamsFeedId == bytes32(0)

    q_streams_validate --> q_revert_decimals: dataStreamsFeedDecimals == 0
    q_revert_decimals --> [*]: revert InvalidFeedDecimals(feedId)
    q_streams_validate --> q_check_version: decimals > 0
    q_check_version --> q_revert_version: version != 3
    q_revert_version --> [*]: revert InvalidFeedVersion(feedId, version)
    q_check_version --> q_check_rotation: version == 3

    q_check_rotation --> q_handle_rotation: previousAsset != address(0) AND previousAsset != asset
    q_check_rotation --> q_update_mapping: no rotation needed
    q_handle_rotation --> q_revert_no_fallback: previousAsset has no usdDataFeed
    q_revert_no_fallback --> [*]: revert Errors.InvalidZeroValue()
    q_handle_rotation --> q_update_mapping: previousAsset has usdDataFeed fallback; clear old streams state

    q_update_mapping --> q_update_allowlist: s_dataStreamsFeedIdToAsset[feedId] = asset

    q_update_allowlist --> q_store_feed: s_allowlistedAssets.add(asset) == true; emit AssetAddedToAllowlist
    q_update_allowlist --> q_cleanup_old_feed: already allowlisted AND feedId changed
    q_update_allowlist --> q_store_feed: already allowlisted AND feedId unchanged
    q_cleanup_old_feed --> q_store_feed: delete old feedIdToAsset and dataStreamsPrice

    q_store_feed --> q_add_loop: s_feedInfo[asset] = feedInfo; emit FeedInfoUpdated; i++
    q_add_loop --> [*]: i >= adds.length

    note right of q_check_rotation
        INV-001: feed ID rotation must preserve price source for previous asset (usdDataFeed != 0)
        INV-002: dataStreamsFeedId version must be exactly 3
        INV-003: dataStreamsFeedDecimals must be non-zero when streams feed is configured
    end note

    note right of q_update_allowlist
        INV-004: each dataStreamsFeedId maps to exactly one asset
        INV-005: old feed ID mappings are cleaned up on update
        INV-006: removes are processed before adds (ordering guarantee)
    end note

Now I have all subgraph data. Let me perform the trust model analysis and property generation, then write the output file.

**Phase A: Trust Model Analysis**

**Actors identified:**
1. **Bidders** (UNTRUSTED) — permissionless callers of `bid()`
2. **CowSwap Solvers** (UNTRUSTED) — interact via `GPV2CompatibleAuction`
3. **Automation Forwarder** (TRUSTED) — `AUCTION_WORKER_ROLE` calling `performUpkeep()`, `PRICE_ADMIN_ROLE` calling `transmit()`
4. **Admin** (TRUSTED) — `DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE`, manages params/config
5. **FeeAggregator** (external contract) — supplies assets via `transferForSwap`
6. **VerifierProxy** (external trust boundary) — verifies Data Streams reports
7. **Data Feed** (SEMI_TRUSTED) — fallback Chainlink price oracle
8. **AssetOutReceiver** — receives accumulated LINK

**Trust Boundaries:**
- TB-1: Bidder → BaseAuction.bid() — Network, in-scope, attacker_controlled=true
- TB-2: CowSwap Solver → GPV2CompatibleAuction — Network, in-scope, attacker_controlled=true
- TB-3: Automation → performUpkeep/transmit — trusted, out-of-scope
- TB-4: BaseAuction → FeeAggregator.transferForSwap — Internal API, out-of-scope
- TB-5: PriceManager → VerifierProxy.verifyBulk — Internal API, out-of-scope (oracle verification)
- TB-6: PriceManager → Data Feed (latestRoundData) — Internal API, in-scope (staleness logic)
- TB-7: BaseAuction → Callback (auctionCallback) — Network, in-scope, attacker_controlled=true

Now writing the output file.
